title: At least 27 killed in fire at Bangkok pub with another 22 critically injured
summary_full: The fire is one of the deadliest such incidents in the popular tourist destination in ⁠recent yearsAn explosive fire at a popular pub in Thailand’s ⁠capital, Bangkok, has killed 27 ⁠people and left another 22 ​in critical condition, in one of the deadliest such incidents in the tourism hub in recent years.Officials said they were investigating whether emergency exits may have been obstructed, hindering patrons from escaping the burning Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao pub. Continue reading...
